title: Everything Announced At The UploadVR Showcase - Summer 2026
summary: The UploadVR Showcase revealed an exciting lineup of over 30 mixed and virtual reality games, catering to diverse player interests.
post_text:
The UploadVR Showcase revealed an exciting lineup of over 30 mixed and virtual reality games, catering to diverse player interests.

The UploadVR Showcase in Summer 2026 featured a wide array of VR games, showcasing over 30 announcements from both indie developers and larger studios.

Among the highlights is 'Guardians Planetfall', a sci-fi co-op game by VirtualAge, where players battle mechs and aliens in groups of four. The game is set for early access later this year on Meta Quest and SteamVR.

Another notable title is 'Bootstrap Island' from MARU VR, a roguelike survival adventure set in the 17th century, allowing players to scavenge for resources and face local tribes. An update is available on SteamVR.

'Board of the Future' by Tomy Horst invites players to experience hoverboarding with customizable challenges, launching on Meta Quest later this year.

Singular Perception's 'Sol Protocol' offers a co-op roguelike adventure in space, entering early access in September 2026, with free playtests available through Discord.

The showcase also introduced 'Salmon Man', a physics VR platformer where players navigate waterways as a salmon character, set to release multiplayer features soon.

Other games include 'C.A.B.A', a playable Backrooms metro level, and 'The Magician VR: The Cursed Wand', where players reclaim their magical powers, both launching on Meta Quest and SteamVR.
